---
title: "Feature matrix"
subtitle: "Coverage of the ggplot2 and plotnine surface in Gribouille."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
engine: markdown
---

## Context

Gribouille is a Typst package that implements a grammar of graphics on top of CeTZ.
This page is the canonical coverage table: one row per public ggplot2 symbol, using the [ggplot2 reference index](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/index.html) as the axis.
Status reflects what is currently in the package; Priority orders the remaining work.

Legend for **Status**:

- Ō£ģ implemented.
- ­¤¤Ī partial or stubbed.
- Ō¼£ missing.
- ŌØī out of scope for a static Typst backend (reason in Notes).

Legend for **Priority** (used to order future work):

- P1 unlocks common plots and blocks other work.
- P2 broadens expressiveness once P1 lands.
- P3 nice-to-have or niche.
- P4 deferred to the very end of the roadmap: requires a wasm helper or heavy numerical code that Typst cannot express natively. **Wasm is a last resort**, added only if a P4 feature is really needed and no native workaround exists. Until then every P4 row sits behind everything in P1 to P3.
- Ōłģ not planned.

## How gribouille currently maps to ggplot2

| Concept           | ggplot2 form                                      | gribouille form                                                                     |
| ----------------- | ------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Plot constructor  | `ggplot(data, aes(...)) + layer + scale + theme`. | `plot(data:, mapping:, layers:, scales:, coord:, facet:, theme:, width:, height:)`. |
| Layer addition    | `+ geom_point()`.                                 | `layers: (geom-point(), ...)`.                                                      |
| Aesthetic mapping | `aes(x = a, y = b, colour = c)`.                  | `aes(x: "a", y: "b", colour: "c")`.                                                 |
| Stat override     | `stat = "bin"` on a geom.                         | `stat:` key on the layer dict, dispatched via `src/stat/apply.typ`.                 |
| Theme composition | `theme_minimal() + theme(...)`.                   | `theme: theme-minimal()` (dict merged by `merge-theme`).                            |

## Feature matrix

### Plot basics

| ggplot2                   | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes                                                            |
| ------------------------- | ----------------- | ------ | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `ggplot()`                | `plot(...)`.      | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                |
| `aes()`                   | `aes(...)`.       | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Accepts `x`, `y`, `colour`, `fill`, `size`, `alpha`, `linewidth`, `shape`, `linetype`, `group`, `label`, `xmin`/`xmax`/`ymin`/`ymax`, `xend`/`yend`, `xintercept`/`yintercept`/`slope`. |
| `%+%` / `add_gg()`        | ŌĆö                 | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | Typst has no lazy plot object; composition is via function args. |
| `ggsave()`                | ŌĆö                 | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | Typst owns the output pipeline.                                  |
| `qplot()` / `quickplot()` | ŌĆö                 | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | Deprecated upstream.                                             |

### Geoms

| ggplot2                                                             | gribouille symbol                                     | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                                                                   |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `geom_point()`                                                      | `geom-point`.                                         | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                                       |
| `geom_line()`                                                       | `geom-line`.                                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | X-sorted connection of observations.                                                                                    |
| `geom_path()`                                                       | `geom-path`.                                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Connects rows in input order.                                                                                           |
| `geom_step()`                                                       | `geom-step`.                                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Stair-step interpolation; `direction` is `"hv"` (default) or `"vh"`.                                                    |
| `geom_col()`                                                        | `geom-col`.                                           | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Honours `position = "stack"`/`"dodge"`/`"fill"`.                                                                        |
| `geom_bar()`                                                        | `geom-bar`.                                           | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Wraps `geom-col` with `stat = "count"` and `position = "stack"`.                                                        |
| `geom_histogram()`                                                  | `geom-histogram`.                                     | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Uses `stat-bin`.                                                                                                        |
| `geom_freqpoly()`                                                   | `geom-freqpoly`.                                      | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Line through `stat-bin` midpoints; `bins` and `binwidth` mirror `geom-histogram`.                                       |
| `geom_ribbon()`                                                     | `geom-ribbon`.                                        | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                                       |
| `geom_area()`                                                       | `geom-area`.                                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Filled polygon between `y = 0` and `y` along x; pulls the y-domain to include zero.                                     |
| `geom_smooth()`                                                     | `geom-smooth`.                                        | ­¤¤Ī     | P3       | `method = "lm"` only; `"loess"` deferred, wasm is last resort.                                                          |
| `geom_boxplot()`                                                    | `geom-boxplot`.                                       | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Default `stat = "boxplot"` runs the per-group five-number summary; raw observations in, full box+whiskers+outliers out. |
| `geom_violin()`                                                     | ŌĆö                                                     | Ō¼£     | P4       | Needs kernel density; deferred, wasm is last resort.                                                                    |
| `geom_density()` / `geom_density_2d()` / `geom_density_2d_filled()` | ŌĆö                                                     | Ō¼£     | P4       | KDE; deferred, wasm is last resort.                                                                                     |
| `geom_dotplot()`                                                    | ŌĆö                                                     | Ō¼£     | P4       | Niche.                                                                                                                  |
| `geom_jitter()`                                                     | `geom-jitter`.                                        | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Point wrapper that defaults `position` to `"jitter"`.                                                                   |
| `geom_rug()`                                                        | `geom-rug`.                                           | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Tick marks at observations on selected sides (`b`/`t`/`l`/`r`).                                                         |
| `geom_text()`                                                       | `geom-text`.                                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Reads the `label` aesthetic.                                                                                            |
| `geom_label()`                                                      | `geom-label`.                                         | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Boxed text with fill, stroke, radius.                                                                                   |
| `geom_rect()` / `geom_tile()`                                       | `geom-rect`, `geom-tile`.                             | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | `geom_raster()` (a ggplot2 fast path for regular grids) is not exposed; use `geom-tile`.                                |
| `geom_polygon()`                                                    | `geom-polygon`.                                       | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | One closed polygon per group; fill via `fill` or scale.                                                                 |
| `geom_segment()`                                                    | `geom-segment`.                                       | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Maps `x`/`y`/`xend`/`yend`.                                                                                             |
| `geom_curve()`                                                      | ŌĆö                                                     | Ō¼£     | P3       | Curved variant of segment; deferred until a real use case appears.                                                      |
| `geom_errorbar()`                                                   | `geom-errorbar`.                                      | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Vertical range with horizontal end caps. `geom_errorbarh` deferred.                                                     |
| `geom_linerange()` / `geom_crossbar()` / `geom_pointrange()`        | `geom-linerange`, `geom-crossbar`, `geom-pointrange`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | linerange has no caps, crossbar is a filled box with a thick median bar, pointrange is a marker plus linerange.         |
| `geom_abline()` / `geom_hline()` / `geom_vline()`                   | `geom-abline`, `geom-hline`, `geom-vline`.            | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Scalar or array intercepts. Trans-aware: under log10/sqrt, abline samples 64 points so the line follows the warp.       |
| `geom_blank()`                                                      | `geom-blank`.                                         | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | No-op draw; trains scales from its data.                                                                                |
| `geom_function()`                                                   | `geom-function`.                                      | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Samples a Typst callable across the x-domain into a polyline.                                                           |
| `geom_qq()` / `geom_qq_line()`                                      | `geom-qq`, `geom-qq-line`.                            | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Reference distribution selectable via `distribution`: `"normal"` (default), `"uniform"`, `"exponential"`. Reference line through 25th and 75th sample quantiles. |
| `geom_quantile()`                                                   | ŌĆö                                                     | Ō¼£     | P4       | Quantile regression; deferred, wasm is last resort.                                                                     |
| `geom_count()`                                                      | `geom-count`.                                         | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Wrapper over `stat-sum`; one point per unique `(x, y)` sized by count.                                                  |
| `geom_bin_2d()` / `geom_hex()`                                      | ŌĆö                                                     | Ō¼£     | P4       | 2D binning.                                                                                                             |
| `geom_contour()` / `geom_contour_filled()`                          | ŌĆö                                                     | Ō¼£     | P4       | Marching squares.                                                                                                       |
| `geom_spoke()`                                                      | ŌĆö                                                     | Ō¼£     | P4       | Niche.                                                                                                                  |
| `geom_map()` / `geom_sf()` / `geom_sf_label()` / `geom_sf_text()`   | ŌĆö                                                     | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | Maps and sf are out of scope.                                                                                           |

### Stats

| ggplot2                                                                                 | gribouille symbol                   | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                                             |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `stat_identity()`                                                                       | `stat-identity` (implicit).         | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                 |
| `stat_count()`                                                                          | `stat-count`.                       | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                 |
| `stat_bin()`                                                                            | `stat-bin`.                         | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                 |
| `stat_smooth()`                                                                         | `stat-smooth`.                      | ­¤¤Ī     | P3       | OLS only; `"loess"` deferred, wasm is last resort.                                                |
| `stat_boxplot()`                                                                        | `stat-boxplot`.                     | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Per-x bucketing with R type-7 quantiles; outliers retained for the geom.                          |
| `stat_summary()` / `stat_summary_bin()`                                                 | `stat-summary`, `stat-summary-bin`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Per-x bucket or per-bin reduction via `mean-se` / `mean-cl-normal` / `mean-sdl` / `median-hilow`. |
| `stat_ecdf()`                                                                           | `stat-ecdf`.                        | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Empirical cumulative distribution: one row per unique x with `y = count_le_x / n`.                |
| `stat_ellipse()`                                                                        | ŌĆö                                   | Ō¼£     | P4       | Normal data ellipses.                                                                             |
| `stat_density()` / `stat_density_2d()` / `stat_density_2d_filled()` / `stat_ydensity()` | ŌĆö                                   | Ō¼£     | P4       | KDE; deferred, wasm is last resort.                                                               |
| `stat_contour()` / `stat_contour_filled()`                                              | ŌĆö                                   | Ō¼£     | P4       | ŌĆö                                                                                                 |
| `stat_bin_2d()` / `stat_bin_hex()` / `stat_summary_2d()` / `stat_summary_hex()`         | ŌĆö                                   | Ō¼£     | P4       | 2D aggregation.                                                                                   |
| `stat_qq()` / `stat_qq_line()`                                                          | `stat-qq`, `stat-qq-line`.          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Reference distribution selectable via `distribution`: `"normal"` (default), `"uniform"`, `"exponential"`. |
| `stat_quantile()`                                                                       | ŌĆö                                   | Ō¼£     | P4       | Deferred, wasm is last resort.                                                                    |
| `stat_function()`                                                                       | `stat-function`.                    | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Samples `fun` over `xlim`; pairs with any geom that consumes `(x, y)` rows.                       |
| `stat_unique()`                                                                         | `stat-unique`.                      | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Drops duplicate `(x, y)` rows; first occurrence wins.                                             |
| `stat_manual()` / `stat_align()` / `stat_connect()`                                     | ŌĆö                                   | Ō¼£     | P4       | Advanced.                                                                                         |
| `stat_sf()` / `stat_sf_coordinates()`                                                   | ŌĆö                                   | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | Out of scope.                                                                                     |
| `after_stat()` / `after_scale()` / `stage()` / `from_theme()`                           | ŌĆö                                   | Ō¼£     | P4       | Late-binding aesthetics.                                                                          |

### Position adjustments

| ggplot2                  | gribouille symbol             | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                                                                                   |
| ------------------------ | ----------------------------- | ------ | -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `position_identity()`    | implicit default.             | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                                                       |
| `position_stack()`       | `position-stack`.             | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Consumed by `geom-col`.                                                                                                                 |
| `position_dodge()`       | `position-dodge`.             | ­¤¤Ī     | P2       | Uniform-width case implemented; widening to handle variable-width and overlapping marks (the ggplot2 `dodge2` use case) is in Slice 2D. |
| `position_dodge2()`      | merged into `position-dodge`. | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | Dropped from the surface; `position-dodge` covers both cases.                                                                           |
| `position_fill()`        | `position-fill`.              | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Stack normalised to 1 per x bucket.                                                                                                     |
| `position_jitter()`      | `position-jitter`.            | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Deterministic seed-based offsets; only continuous columns are jittered.                                                                 |
| `position_nudge()`       | `position-nudge`.             | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Fixed `(x, y)` shift on every row.                                                                                                      |
| `position_jitterdodge()` | ŌĆö                             | Ō¼£     | P3       | Dodge then jitter; defer until a real bar+jitter use case appears.                                                                      |

### Annotations

| ggplot2                                       | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                                                         |
| --------------------------------------------- | ----------------- | ------ | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `annotate()`                                  | `annotate`.       | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Sugar over a one-row layer; supports `text`, `point`, `label`, `segment`, `rect`, `vline`, `hline`, `abline`. |
| `annotation_custom()` / `annotation_raster()` | ŌĆö                 | Ō¼£     | P3       | Map to CeTZ primitives.                                                                                       |
| `annotation_logticks()`                       | ŌĆö                 | Ō¼£     | P3       | Needs log trans first.                                                                                        |
| `annotation_map()` / `borders()`              | ŌĆö                 | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | Maps out of scope.                                                                                            |

### Aesthetics (names consumed by `aes()`)

| ggplot2                                                                    | gribouille                                               | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `x`, `y`                                                                   | `x`, `y`.                                                | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `xmin`, `xmax`, `ymin`, `ymax`                                             | `xmin`, `xmax`, `ymin`, `ymax`.                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Exposed via `aes()` and trained like other positional aesthetics.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `xend`, `yend`                                                             | `xend`, `yend`.                                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Folded into the x and y axis domains during scale training; consumed by @geom-segment.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `colour`, `fill`                                                           | `colour`, `fill`.                                        | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `alpha`                                                                    | passed as a constant param.                              | ­¤¤Ī     | P2       | Promote to a mapped aesthetic.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `size`                                                                     | via `scale-size-continuous`.                             | ­¤¤Ī     | P2       | Not mapped via `aes()` in every geom.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `shape`                                                                    | `shape` via `scale-shape`.                               | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Circle, square, triangle, diamond, cross, x, star, triangle-down palette.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `linetype`                                                                 | `linetype` via `scale-linetype`.                         | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Solid, dashed, dotted, dash-dotted, densely-dashed, loosely-dashed palette.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `linewidth`                                                                | ŌĆö                                                        | Ō¼£     | P2       | Mapped line width.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `stroke`                                                                   | ŌĆö                                                        | Ō¼£     | P3       | Point outline width.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `group`                                                                    | `group`.                                                 | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `weight`                                                                   | ŌĆö                                                        | Ō¼£     | P3       | Weighted stats.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `lower`, `middle`, `upper`, `ymin`, `ymax`, `outliers`                     | computed by `stat-boxplot`, consumed by `geom-boxplot`.  | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Internal aesthetics carried between stat and geom.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Inline type coercion (`aes(colour = factor(x))`, `aes(x = as.numeric(g))`) | `as-factor("col")` / `as-numeric("col")` inside `aes()`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ggplot2 forces a mapping discrete or continuous at the `aes()` call site with `factor()` / `as.numeric()`. In gribouille, `as-factor` and `as-numeric` are dual-arity: called with `(data, col)` they rewrite the column across the whole plot, called with `(col)` from inside `aes()` they return a `(kind: "mapping-ref", var: col, type: "discrete" \| "continuous")` annotation that scopes the coercion to a single aesthetic. Scale training in `src/scale/train.typ` accepts either a plain string or the annotation dict via the `mapping-ref-col` / `mapping-ref-type` helpers, so the same numeric column can be continuous on `x` and discrete on `colour` in one plot. |

### Positional scales

| ggplot2                                                                                                                 | gribouille symbol                                                                                       | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                                                                                                    |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `scale_x_continuous()` / `scale_y_continuous()`                                                                         | `scale-x-continuous`, `scale-y-continuous`.                                                             | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                                                                        |
| `scale_x_discrete()` / `scale_y_discrete()`                                                                             | `scale-x-discrete`, `scale-y-discrete`.                                                                 | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                                                                        |
| `scale_x_log10()` / `scale_y_log10()`                                                                                   | `scale-x-log10`, `scale-y-log10`.                                                                       | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Powers-of-10 break placement; sub-decade `(2, 5)` ticks emitted for narrow ranges.                                                                       |
| `scale_x_sqrt()` / `scale_y_sqrt()`                                                                                     | `scale-x-sqrt`, `scale-y-sqrt`.                                                                         | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                                                                                        |
| `scale_x_reverse()` / `scale_y_reverse()`                                                                               | `scale-x-reverse`, `scale-y-reverse`.                                                                   | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Implemented by swapping the range endpoints during mapping.                                                                                              |
| `scale_x_binned()` / `scale_y_binned()`                                                                                 | `scale-x-binned`, `scale-y-binned`.                                                                     | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Quantised continuous axis with ticks at bin midpoints.                                                                                                   |
| `scale_x_date()` / `scale_y_date()` / `scale_x_datetime()` / `scale_y_datetime()` / `scale_x_time()` / `scale_y_time()` | `scale-x-date`, `scale-y-date`, `scale-x-datetime`, `scale-y-datetime`, `scale-x-time`, `scale-y-time`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Accepts ISO-8601 strings (`"2024-01-15"`, `"2024-01-15T08:30:00"`, `"08:30"`) or numeric epoch input. Axis labels formatted via Typst `datetime.display(date-format)`. Timezone offsets ignored. |

### Colour and fill scales

| ggplot2                                                       | gribouille symbol                                                                                    | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                                    |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `scale_colour_continuous()` / `scale_fill_continuous()`       | `scale-colour-continuous`, `scale-fill-continuous`.                                                  | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                        |
| `scale_colour_discrete()` / `scale_fill_discrete()`           | `scale-colour-discrete`, `scale-fill-discrete`.                                                      | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                                        |
| `scale_colour_manual()` / `scale_fill_manual()`               | `scale-colour-manual`, `scale-fill-manual`.                                                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | User-supplied palette array.                                                             |
| `scale_colour_viridis_c/d/b()` / `scale_fill_viridis_c/d/b()` | `scale-colour-viridis-c/d/b`, `scale-fill-viridis-c/d/b`.                                            | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | viridis, magma, plasma, inferno, cividis.                                                |
| `scale_colour_brewer()` / `scale_fill_brewer()`               | `scale-colour-brewer`, `scale-fill-brewer`.                                                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | 24 ColorBrewer palettes (qualitative, sequential, diverging) via `brewer-palette(name)`. |
| `scale_colour_gradient()` / `gradient2()` / `gradientn()`     | `scale-colour-gradient`, `scale-colour-gradient2`, `scale-colour-gradientn` (and fill counterparts). | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Two-stop, diverging-around-midpoint, and n-stop gradients; legend colourbars match.      |
| `scale_colour_steps()` / `steps2()` / `stepsn()`              | `scale-colour-steps`, `scale-colour-steps2`, `scale-colour-stepsn`, plus fill counterparts.          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Binned variants of `gradient`/`gradient2`/`gradientn`.                                  |
| `scale_colour_grey()` / `scale_fill_grey()`                   | `scale-colour-grey`, `scale-fill-grey`.                                                              | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Discrete grey ramp from `start` to `end` luminance.                                      |
| `scale_colour_hue()` / `scale_fill_hue()`                     | `scale-colour-hue`, `scale-fill-hue`.                                                                | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | OKLCh-spaced hues; near-equivalent to ggplot2's HCL defaults.                            |
| `scale_colour_distiller()` / `fermenter()`                    | `scale-colour-distiller`, `scale-colour-fermenter`, plus fill counterparts.                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Continuous and binned Brewer; `direction: -1` reverses.                                  |
| `scale_colour_identity()` / `scale_fill_identity()`           | `scale-colour-identity`, `scale-fill-identity`.                                                      | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Column values are passed through (hex strings or `color` values). No legend is drawn.    |

### Other aesthetic scales

| ggplot2                                                                                                                                  | gribouille symbol                                  | Status | Priority | Notes                                                    |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| `scale_alpha()` / `*_continuous()` / `*_discrete()`                                                                                      | ŌĆö                                                  | Ō¼£     | P2       | After `alpha` aesthetic lands.                           |
| `scale_size()` / `scale_radius()`                                                                                                        | `scale-size-continuous`.                           | ­¤¤Ī     | P2       | Add radius variant.                                      |
| `scale_size_area()` / `scale_size_binned_area()`                                                                                         | `scale-size-area`, `scale-size-binned-area`.       | ­¤¤Ī     | P3       | Spec dicts ship; geoms do not yet consume the trained size scale, so per-row size resolution is a follow-up. |
| `scale_size_binned()`                                                                                                                    | `scale-size-binned`.                               | ­¤¤Ī     | P3       | Same caveat as `scale_size_area`.                        |
| `scale_shape()` / `scale_shape_manual()` / `scale_shape_binned()`                                                                        | `scale-shape`, `scale-shape-manual`.               | ­¤¤Ī     | P3       | `_binned` variant deferred.                              |
| `scale_linetype()` / `scale_linetype_manual()` / `scale_linetype_binned()` / `scale_linetype_continuous()` / `scale_linetype_discrete()` | `scale-linetype`, `scale-linetype-manual`.         | ­¤¤Ī     | P3       | `_binned`, `_continuous`, `_discrete` variants deferred. |
| `scale_linewidth()` / `scale_linewidth_manual()` / `scale_linewidth_binned()`                                                            | ŌĆö                                                  | Ō¼£     | P2       | After `linewidth` aesthetic.                             |
| `scale_shape_identity()` / `scale_linetype_identity()`                                                                                   | `scale-shape-identity`, `scale-linetype-identity`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Column values used as the shape / dash keyword directly. |
| `scale_size_identity()` / `scale_alpha_identity()` / `scale_linewidth_identity()`                                                        | `scale-size-identity`, `scale-alpha-identity`, `scale-linewidth-identity`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Column values used as the size / alpha / linewidth directly. |

### Labels and limits

| ggplot2                           | gribouille symbol                                                 | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                               |
| --------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `labs()`                          | `labs(title:, subtitle:, caption:, x:, y:, colour:, fill:, ...)`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Axis names are injected into trained scale specs. Covers the role of `xlab` / `ylab` / `ggtitle`. |
| `get_labs()`                      | ŌĆö                                                                 | Ō¼£     | P3       | ŌĆö                                                                                   |
| `lims()` / `xlim()` / `ylim()`    | ŌĆö                                                                 | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | Use `scale-x-continuous(limits:)` / `scale-y-continuous(limits:)` directly.         |
| `expansion()` / `expand_scale()`  | via scale `expand:`.                                              | ­¤¤Ī     | P3       | Expose helper.                                                                      |
| `expand_limits()`                 | `expand-limits`.                                                  | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Folds extension values into the trained continuous domain rather than replacing it. |

### Guides

| ggplot2                                                        | gribouille symbol                               | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                 |
| -------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Discrete `guide_legend()` for colour/fill                      | automatic legend.                               | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                     |
| `guide_colourbar()`                                            | automatic colourbar.                            | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Emitted when trained colour/fill is continuous.                       |
| `guide_legend()` customisation (nrow, ncol, reverse, ...)      | `guide-legend(title:, nrow:, ncol:, reverse:)`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Plot-level binding via `guides(colour: guide-legend(...))`.           |
| `guide_bins()` / `guide_coloursteps()`                         | ŌĆö                                               | Ō¼£     | P3       | After binned scales.                                                  |
| `guide_axis()`                                                 | `guide-axis(angle:, n-dodge:)`.                 | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | x-axis only for v1; y-axis rotation/dodge deferred.                   |
| `guide_axis_logticks()`                                        | ŌĆö                                               | Ō¼£     | P3       | After log trans.                                                      |
| `guide_none()`                                                 | `guide-none`.                                   | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Suppress a specific aesthetic's legend.                               |
| `guide_axis_stack()` / `guide_axis_theta()` / `guide_custom()` | ŌĆö                                               | Ō¼£     | P4       | Advanced.                                                             |
| `guides()` top-level                                           | `guides`.                                       | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Threaded into `plot(..., guides: guides(colour: guide-legend(...)))`. |
| `sec_axis()` / `dup_axis()`                                   | `sec-axis`, `dup-axis`.                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Passed via `secondary:` on `scale-x-continuous` / `scale-y-continuous`. `derive()` deferred. |
| `draw_key_*()` glyph family                                    | `draw-key-point`, `draw-key-line`, `draw-key-rect`, `draw-key-path`, `draw-key-blank`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Auto-dispatched by geom kind; legend swatches now match the layer's visual.    |

### Facetting

| ggplot2                                                                                                                        | gribouille symbol           | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                                                     |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------- | ------ | -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `facet_wrap()`                                                                                                                 | `facet-wrap`.               | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | `scales = "fixed"` (default), `"free"`, `"free_x"`, `"free_y"`; per-facet stats via `partition-by-group`. |
| `facet_grid()`                                                                                                                 | `facet-grid(rows:, cols:)`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Strips on top (columns) and right (rows); shared scales only.                                             |
| `vars()`                                                                                                                       | ŌĆö                           | Ō¼£     | P2       | Helper to quote faceting variables.                                                                       |
| `labeller()` / `label_value()` / `label_both()` / `label_context()` / `label_wrap_gen()` | `labeller`, `label-value`, `label-both`, `label-context`, `label-wrap`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Passed via `labeller:` on `facet-wrap` / `facet-grid`. `label_parsed`/`label_bquote` deferred. |

### Coordinates

| ggplot2                                           | gribouille symbol  | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------------------------------------------------- | ------------------ | ------ | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `coord_cartesian()`                               | `coord-cartesian`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | `xlim`/`ylim` override trained x/y domains (data is not dropped; out-of-range marks still render).                                                                 |
| `coord_fixed()`                                   | `coord-fixed`.     | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Locks the aspect ratio so one x data unit equals `ratio` y data units. Honoured in non-faceted, facet-wrap (per-panel under free scales), and facet-grid renders.           |
| `coord_flip()`                                    | `coord-flip`.      | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Swaps x and y at render time. Common geoms (point, line, col, bar, segment, abline/hline/vline) verified; less-common geoms inherit the swap and may need per-geom adjustment. |
| `coord_polar()` / `coord_radial()`                | ŌĆö                  | Ō¼£     | P4       | Significant rewrite.                                                                                                                                               |
| `coord_trans()` / `coord_transform()`             | ŌĆö                  | Ō¼£     | P4       | Visual transformation without scale retraining.                                                                                                                    |
| `coord_map()` / `coord_quickmap()` / `coord_sf()` | ŌĆö                  | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | Maps out of scope.                                                                                                                                                 |

### Themes

| ggplot2                                                                                                                                 | gribouille symbol                                                                      | Status | Priority | Notes                                                                  |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `theme_minimal()`                                                                                                                       | `theme-minimal`.                                                                       | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                      |
| `theme_classic()`                                                                                                                       | `theme-classic`.                                                                       | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                      |
| `theme_void()`                                                                                                                          | `theme-void`.                                                                          | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | ŌĆö                                                                      |
| `theme_grey()` / `theme_bw()` / `theme_linedraw()` / `theme_light()` / `theme_dark()` / `theme_test()`                                  | `theme-grey`, `theme-bw`, `theme-linedraw`, `theme-light`, `theme-dark`, `theme-test`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | British spelling only: no `theme-gray` alias.                          |
| `theme()`                                                                                                                               | `theme(..fields)`.                                                                     | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Translates `element_*` dicts into flat keys consumed by `merge-theme`. |
| `element_blank()` / `element_rect()` / `element_line()` / `element_text()` / `element_polygon()` / `element_point()` / `element_geom()` | `element-blank`, `element-rect`, `element-line`, `element-text`.                       | ­¤¤Ī     | P2       | `element-polygon`/`element-point`/`element-geom` deferred.             |
| `margin()` / `margin_part()` / `margin_auto()` / `rel()`                                                                                | ŌĆö                                                                                      | Ō¼£     | P3       | Sizing helpers.                                                        |
| `theme_get()` / `theme_set()` / `theme_update()` / `theme_replace()` / `%+replace%`                                                     | ŌĆö                                                                                      | Ō¼£     | P3       | Global theme state; may stay plot-arg only.                            |
| `theme_sub_axis*()` / `theme_sub_legend()` / `theme_sub_panel()` / `theme_sub_plot()` / `theme_sub_strip()`                             | ŌĆö                                                                                      | Ō¼£     | P4       | Shortcut groups.                                                       |

### Helpers

| ggplot2                                                            | gribouille symbol                                        | Status | Priority | Notes                                                               |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `cut_interval()` / `cut_number()` / `cut_width()`                  | `cut-interval`, `cut-number`, `cut-width`.               | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Pure helpers; bin labels of the form `"(lo,hi]"`.                   |
| `resolution()`                                                     | `resolution`.                                            | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Zero-aware by default; matches ggplot2.                             |
| `mean_se()` / `mean_cl_normal()` / `mean_sdl()` / `median_hilow()` | `mean-se`, `mean-cl-normal`, `mean-sdl`, `median-hilow`. | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | `mean-cl-normal` panics on `conf != 0.95`. `mean_cl_boot` deferred. |

### Programming and extension

| ggplot2                                                                          | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes                                                             |
| -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `ggproto()` / `ggproto_parent()`                                                 | ŌĆö                 | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | S3/R6 pattern; Typst uses dict-of-functions instead.              |
| `aes_()` / `aes_string()` / `aes_q()`                                            | ŌĆö                 | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | Deprecated upstream.                                              |
| `print.ggplot` / `plot.ggplot`                                                   | ŌĆö                 | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | Typst handles rendering.                                          |
| `autoplot()` / `autolayer()` / `fortify()` / `map_data()` / `automatic_plotting` | ŌĆö                 | ŌØī     | Ōłģ        | R S3 dispatch.                                                    |
| `get_alt_text()`                                                                 | `get-alt-text`.   | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Reads `spec.alt` set via the new `plot(..., alt: ...)` parameter. |

### Bundled datasets

| ggplot2                                                                                                                              | gribouille                              | Status | Priority | Notes                                                               |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `mpg`, `economics`                                                                                                                   | `mpg` (30 rows), `economics` (24 rows). | Ō£ģ     | ŌĆö        | Small subsets bundled for examples; values plausible but not exact. |
| Other datasets (`diamonds`, `economics_long`, `faithfuld`, `midwest`, `msleep`, `presidential`, `seals`, `txhousing`, `luv_colours`) | ŌĆö                                       | Ō¼£     | P4       | Ship if a real example asks for them.                               |

## Coverage at a glance

- **Plot basics**: `plot()` and `aes()` covering `x`, `y`, `colour`, `fill`, `size`, `alpha`, `group`.
- **Geoms**: `point`, `line`, `path`, `step`, `col`, `bar`, `histogram`, `freqpoly`, `ribbon`, `area`, `boxplot`, `jitter`, `rug`, `text`, `label`, `rect`, `tile`, `polygon`, `segment`, `errorbar`, `linerange`, `crossbar`, `pointrange`, `abline`, `hline`, `vline`, `blank`, `function`, `qq`, `qq-line`; `geom-smooth` covers `method = "lm"` only.
- **Stats**: `stat-identity`, `stat-count`, `stat-bin`, `stat-boxplot`, `stat-summary`, `stat-summary-bin`, `stat-ecdf`, `stat-qq`, `stat-qq-line`, `stat-unique`; `stat-smooth` covers `method = "lm"` only.
- **Positions**: `identity`, `stack`, `fill`, `jitter`, `nudge`; `position-dodge` covers the uniform-width case.
- **Annotations**: `annotate()` with `text`, `point`, `label`, `segment`, `rect`, `vline`, `hline`, `abline`.
- **Positional scales**: continuous, discrete, log10, sqrt, reverse, date, datetime, time, on x and y.
- **Colour and fill scales**: continuous, discrete, manual, viridis (c/d/b), brewer, gradient, gradient2, gradientn, grey, hue, distiller, identity.
- **Other aesthetic scales**: shape and linetype (with manual and identity variants); `scale-size-continuous` partial; alpha, linewidth, and binned variants deferred.
- **Coords**: `coord-cartesian` (with xlim/ylim) and `coord-fixed`; flip, polar, and trans deferred.
- **Facets**: `facet-wrap` (`fixed`/`free`/`free_x`/`free_y` scales) and `facet-grid` (shared scales only).
- **Themes**: `theme-minimal`, `theme-classic`, `theme-void`, `theme-grey`, `theme-bw`, `theme-linedraw`, `theme-light`, `theme-dark`, `theme-test`, plus `theme()` with `element-blank`, `element-rect`, `element-line`, `element-text`.
- **Guides**: `guide-legend` with `title`/`nrow`/`ncol`/`reverse`, automatic `guide-colourbar` for continuous colour and fill, `guide-axis` (x-axis only), `guide-none`, and a top-level `guides()` binder.
- **Helpers**: `cut-interval`, `cut-number`, `cut-width`, `resolution`, `mean-se`, `mean-cl-normal`, `mean-sdl`, `median-hilow`.
- **Datasets**: `mpg` (30 rows) and `economics` (24 rows).

## How this page is updated

Every implementation slice flips the Status column for every row it touches in the same commit as the code.
